hero.headline: The gift they'll remember.
hero.sub: Specialty coffee gift boxes with a story — curated by an expert, with your company branding included.
hero.detail: French press or Italian moka · Micro-lot curated by Lorena Luna · From 10 units
hero.ctaSub: Reply within 2 hours · Monday to Friday

boxes.headline: Two boxes. One easy choice.
boxes.sub: Choose based on how your team likes their coffee. Everything else — coffee, curation, branding — is included.

prensa.name: French Press Box
prensa.ideal: Ideal for: offices, remote workers, people who enjoy a full-body cup.

moka.name: Moka Box
moka.ideal: Ideal for: espresso lovers, home kitchens, a gift with personality.

boxes.footnote: Minimum order: 10 boxes. Production time: 7–10 business days.

threshold.label: For orders of 15 boxes or more
threshold.headline: Every box includes a live class with Lorena.
threshold.body: Orders of 15 boxes or more include a QR card in every box that unlocks a personalized online session for your whole team. Lorena teaches them how to prepare the coffee they received — its origin, its story, and the right method step by step. One session per order.
threshold.quote: "It's not just a gift. It's an experience your team will remember."

coffee.headline: Every box has the best coffee available at that moment.
coffee.body: The coffee in each box is not a fixed product. It's a specialty micro-lot — a small batch from a specific farm, from a specific harvest — selected by Lorena at the time of your order. Micro-lots change with the season, the producer, and the region. That means every box is unrepeatable.
coffee.f1body: We know which farm it came from, who grew it, and how it was processed.
coffee.f2body: Typica, Bourbon, Geisha, natural, washed, honey — specialty coffee has an identity.
coffee.f3body: Every box includes a card written by Lorena with the origin, tasting notes, and brew guide.

branding.headline: Your brand, on every box.
branding.body: Your company logo and branding go on the box as standard — no extra cost, no minimum increase. Not a sticker on a generic box.
branding.req1: Your logo file (PNG or SVG, high resolution)
branding.req2: Optional: message for your team or clients (max 80 words)

lorena.headline: Lorena Luna, barista and specialty coffee expert.
lorena.body: Lorena is a professional barista, coffee taster, and expert across the entire coffee production chain — from farm to cup. She selects the micro-lot in every box, writes the curation card, and leads the live classes for corporate teams.
lorena.quote: "My commitment is that whoever receives this box understands that the coffee has a story — and that story is worth knowing."

proof.empty: The first stories are on their way.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.q2: Is the coffee always the same?
faq.a2: No — and that's intentional. Lorena selects the best available specialty micro-lot at the time of your order. The coffee changes with the season and the producers.
faq.a3: Your company logo goes on the box as standard — no extra cost. We just need your logo file in high resolution.
faq.q4: What does the class with Lorena include?
faq.a4: A 45–60 minute online session for your team. Covers the coffee they received: origin, story, tasting notes, and how to prepare it. Available for orders of 15 boxes or more.
faq.a5: 7–10 business days for branded orders. We deliver in CDMX and ship nationwide in Mexico.
faq.q6: Can I mix box types in one order?
faq.a6: Yes — you can mix French Press and Moka boxes in the same order, as long as the total is 10 boxes or more.
faq.a7: Yes. We are a legally registered company in Mexico. Upon order confirmation we request your RFC and fiscal data to issue a SAT-compliant CFDI invoice.

finalCta.headline: Ready to give a gift they'll remember?
finalCta.sub: Message us on WhatsApp. We'll send a quote in under 2 hours.
finalCta.detail2: Minimum 10 boxes · Delivery in CDMX and nationwide Mexico

footer.address: Av. José Martí 300, Escandón II, Miguel Hidalgo, CDMX 11800, Mexico

quote.headline: Request a quote
quote.sub: Tell us what you need. We'll get back to you in under 2 hours.
quote.message: Message for your team (optional, max 80 words)
quote.successBody: We'll contact you on WhatsApp within 2 hours on business days.
quote.errorBody: Please try again or message us directly on WhatsApp.

tracking.headline: Track your order
tracking.sub: Enter your order code to see the current status.
tracking.notFound: We couldn't find an order with that code.
